name: Aftermath Silver Ltd.
description: Aftermath Silver Ltd. is a Canadian junior exploration and development company focused on silver and critical metals, with its flagship 100%-owned Berenguela Silver-Copper-Manganese project located in the Department of Puno, southern Peru. The company published a NI 43-101 mineral resource estimate for Berenguela in December 2025 and appointed DRA Global in early 2026 to lead a Preliminary Feasibility Study. Aftermath Silver is at the developer stage, advancing Berenguela through pre-feasibility while also holding the Challacollo and Cachinal silver-gold projects in Chile.
